action.reasoning: Observation: Best val r2 still 0.5736 from warm-start; training plateaued. We have 0.44h left. Best.pt was overwritten only if new best beat init — it did not (best stayed 0.5736 init), so best.pt should still be the warm-started model. But wait — the script saves only if r2_full > best, and best=0.5736 from init, so best.pt was NOT overwritten. Good. Decision: just submit eval on current best.pt to lock the 0.517 score (which seems to be our actual eval score). Skip more training to save time.
